TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mark_Baker, title = Mark_Baker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_Baker} }

S.FORM: Mark Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 11, Mark Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mark Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 11, Mark Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark βaker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mark βaker, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
